epigraph.quote: We have been extraordinarily lucky with the rain - mainly at night, pinging on the metal roof

per_stop.quote: She agreed to move to Sunrise in Edgbaston. We had a glass of wine.
He took us first to Simon's surprise - a vineyard! White grapes. Eventually 3 tons of juice a year!
Then we drove on past Lorna Doone's Farm to a nearby camp site, near Oare
We passed salt meadows along the estuary. There only flood at very high tides.
V. windy. Lovely view. Simon has changed the windscreen wipers + light bulb.
